title: Dolt: This Makes SQL Feel Like Git
summary: Dolt is a SQL database that applies Git-style workflows to structured data, enabling branches, commits, diffs, merges, and pull requests on database tables. The tool uses Prolly Trees as its underlying data structure and is positioned for ML datasets, test data, game configs, and production data management.
